Thanks for downloading these tiles!

These sets are directly built onto the tilesets from the Elements: Hometown tileset pack.

The one included in that pack works for the "summer" set, so here are three alternatives that 
can be used to tile-swap directly with your seasonal weather.

I'm releasing this as a FREE UPDATE to my Elements Hometown pack! 
This release is my 2025 christmas present to the community. 
I hope that these will be useful for your game project!

Releases like these wouldn't be possible without patrons. Thank you!

------

Merry Christmas and Happy New Year!
 - Jason (finalbossblues)
patreon.com/finalbossblues
	12. 22. 2025
